projects.name: wanshuiyin/Anti-Autoresearch
projects.description: Don't trust an autoresearch paper at face value. Reviewer-side integrity forensics (self-consistency + fabrication), deterministic verdict. 61 signals: 46 integrity hack-patterns (families A–H, verdict-bearing) + 13 zero-weight AI writing-style impressions (AIS) + 2 advisory. Not an opaque AI-text classifier. The dual of ARIS.
projects.full_description: Don't trust an autoresearch paper at face value. Reviewer-side integrity forensics (self-consistency + fabrication), deterministic verdict. 61 signals: 46 integrity hack-patterns (families A–H, verdict-bearing) + 13 zero-weight AI writing-style impressions (AIS) + 2 advisory. Not an opaque AI-text classifier. The dual of ARIS.
